title: Convert board into a multi-level board or vice versa

posts.author: gbriggs (Gina Briggs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Since multi-level views are a new board format, there are some boards I would like to convert from regular to multi-level without recreating the entire board. Additionally, there are some boards I started as multi-level but realized that level of detail wasn’t required and I would like to convert it back to a regular board.

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to change board types from regular to multi-level or multi-level to regular without starting from scratch.

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Omg yes, 100% agree.

Kind of surprising this wasn’t included with the initial release. Having to recreate boards or copy/move items just to switch between regular and multi-level is a huge lift, especially on larger boards.

Board structure shouldn’t be a one-way decision. Needs evolve, and we should be able to adjust without rebuilding everything from scratch.

This would save a ton of time and make adoption of multi-level boards way less risky.
